_comment: Track B (ESCALATE path). Named 'send_email' deliberately -- it's already in TruClaw-Policies.template.json's default alwaysDangerousTools, so no policy edit is needed to test escalation. Doesn't actually send an email -- same echo handler as the safe-path registration.
name: send_email
description: Throwaway smoke-test tool, dangerous path. Echoes back whatever message it's given -- name chosen only to trip TruClaw's alwaysDangerousTools rule.
